metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

parameters.item/body: Eine neue Kalkulationsversion "@{outputs('Create_Calculation')?['body/hso_name']}" wurde als Kopie von "@{outputs('Get_Calculation')?['body/hso_name']}" erstellt.
Beim Erstellen der Kalkulationsversion "@{outputs('Create_Calculation')?['body/hso_name']}" als Kopie von "@{outputs('Get_Calculation')?['body/hso_name']}" ist ein Fehler aufgetreten!

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

Set_varNumberOfItemsPerBulkOperationMess.description: Always round up to the next whole number

Filter_Calculation_Positions_by_Project_.description: Get all Calculation Positions of Type 'Project Product' where no BOM is assigned. Project Product Positions with BOM are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Calculation_Positions_by_BOM_Proj.description: Get all Calculation Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Exclude Positions from Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Calculation_Positions_by_Project_.description: Get all Calculation Positions of Type 'Project Product' where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Update_Processing_Log_.description: Update Processing Log with processed Calculation Surcharge Groups, Calculation Metal Prices and Calculation Project Products

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

Respond_to_App.description: Response to Custom Page with Processing Log GUID to show Processing Progress

definition.description: If a new calculation is created as a copy of a selected calculation, the required parameters such as surcharge groups, metal prices, sales prices and payment terms are copied from the source calculation. The calculation positions with all costs and prices together with related information like project products and text blocks are copied as well. Thus no re-calculation is executed.
